nodes.name: Squarespace Form Webhook
nodes.notes: Configure Squarespace form to POST to this webhook URL. Fields: name, email, company, title, message

nodes.name: Enrich with Apollo
nodes.notes: Header: x-api-key = your Apollo API key. Alternative: use Clearbit.

values.name: system_prompt
values.value: You are a lead qualification assistant for a solo RevOps consultant who works with B2B SaaS companies ($10-100M ARR). You evaluate inbound leads to determine fit and priority. Be decisive — a clear "not a fit" is more valuable than a wishy-washy "maybe."

values.name: user_prompt

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ properties: { email: $json.lead_email, firstname: $json.lead_name.split(' ')[0], lastname: $json.lead_name.split(' ').slice(1).join(' '), company: $json.company_name, jobtitle: $json.title, lead_score: String($json.fit_score), lead_tier: $json.tier, hs_lead_status: $json.tier === 'Hot' ? 'NEW' : 'OPEN' } }) }}

parameters.subject: =🔥 Hot Lead: {{ $json.lead_name }} @ {{ $json.company_name }} (Score: {{ $json.fit_score }})
parameters.message:
=

New Hot Lead

{{ $json.lead_name }} — {{ $json.title }} at {{ $json.company_name }}

Score: {{ $json.fit_score }}/100 ({{ $json.tier }})

ICP Match: {{ $json.icp_match }}

Why: {{ $json.reason }}

Their message: {{ $json.message }}

Recommended action: {{ $json.recommended_action }}

Research notes: {{ $json.research_notes }}

Response draft has been created in Gmail.

nodes.name: Create Response Draft
nodes.notes: Set operation to 'createDraft' in n8n UI — review before sending!
